# Module Assessment вЂ” Implement Vector Search on Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

> KhoГЎ: AI-200 В· Cosmos DB вЂ” Implement vector search on Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

---

## CГўu 1

**A developer is creating a container to store knowledge base documents with embeddings generated by the text-embedding-ada-002 model. Which vector policy configuration correctly specifies the embedding path for this model?**

- Set `dataType` to float32, `dimensions` to 1536, and `distanceFunction` to cosine вњ…
- Set `dataType` to int8, `dimensions` to 1024, and `distanceFunction` to euclidean
- Set `dataType` to float16, `dimensions` to 3072, and `distanceFunction` to dotproduct

**ДђГЎp ГЎn: float32, 1536, cosine**

`text-embedding-ada-002` generate **1,536-dimensional** vectors вЂ” dimensions phбєЈi match chГ­nh xГЎc.

`float32` lГ  default vГ  recommended вЂ” full precision, khГґng cбє§n trade-off б»џ giai Д‘oбєЎn Д‘бє§u.

`cosine` lГ  recommended cho Azure OpenAI embeddings vГ¬ chГєng lГ  **normalized vectors** вЂ” cosine similarity tГ­nh gГіc giб»Їa vectors, phГ№ hб»Јp nhбєҐt cho semantic text similarity.

```python
vector_embedding_policy = {
    "vectorEmbeddings": [
        {
            "path": "/embedding",
            "dataType": "float32",
            "distanceFunction": "cosine",
            "dimensions": 1536    # PhбєЈi match text-embedding-ada-002
        }
    ]
}
```

TбєЎi sao cГЎc Д‘ГЎp ГЎn cГІn lбєЎi sai:
- **int8, 1024, euclidean:** `int8` lГ  quantized type cho compressed embeddings; 1024 khГґng match `ada-002` (1,536); euclidean lГ  least common cho text embeddings vГ  khГґng phГ№ hб»Јp vб»›i normalized vectors.
- **float16, 3072, dotproduct:** 3,072 lГ  dimension cб»§a `text-embedding-3-large`, khГґng phбєЈi `ada-002`. Sai model dimensions = vector policy mismatch в†’ insert fail.

## CГўu 2

**An AI application executes vector searches that return 100 results to display to users, but query performance is slow and RU consumption is high. Which change would most effectively improve performance while maintaining search quality?**

- Force brute-force search by setting the third parameter of VectorDistance to true
- Remove the ORDER BY clause from the query
- Reduce the TOP N clause to return only 10-20 results вњ…

**ДђГЎp ГЎn: Reduce TOP N**

Returning 100 results khi users chб»‰ thбєҐy Д‘Ж°б»Јc 10-20 items lГ  over-fetching. Cosmos DB phбєЈi process, rank, vГ  transfer 100 items thay vГ¬ 10-20. GiбєЈm TOP N = trб»±c tiбєїp giбєЈm RU consumption vГ  latency.

```sql
-- TrЖ°б»›c: chбє­m, tб»‘n RU
SELECT TOP 100 c.id, c.title, VectorDistance(c.embedding, @q) AS Score
FROM c ORDER BY VectorDistance(c.embedding, @q)

-- Sau: nhanh hЖЎn, Г­t RU hЖЎn
SELECT TOP 10 c.id, c.title, VectorDistance(c.embedding, @q) AS Score
FROM c ORDER BY VectorDistance(c.embedding, @q)
```

TбєЎi sao cГЎc Д‘ГЎp ГЎn cГІn lбєЎi sai:
- **Brute-force search:** LГ  tб»‡ hЖЎn, khГґng tб»‘t hЖЎn. Brute-force so sГЎnh query vector vб»›i **mб»Ќi document** вЂ” consume nhiб»Ѓu RU hЖЎn vГ  latency cao hЖЎn. DiskANN index Д‘ang Д‘Ж°б»Јc dГ№ng lГ  tб»‘t hЖЎn.
- **Remove ORDER BY:** `ORDER BY VectorDistance()` lГ  bбєЇt buб»™c Д‘б»ѓ semantic search cГі nghД©a вЂ” sбєЇp xбєїp kбєїt quбєЈ theo relevance. Bб»Џ ORDER BY = kбєїt quбєЈ random, khГґng ranked, khГґng cГІn lГ  "search" nб»Їa.

## CГўu 3

**A support knowledge base application needs to find documents similar to a user's query but only within a specific product category. Which query structure efficiently combines vector search with metadata filtering?**

- Execute a cross-partition vector search first, then filter results by category in application code
- Include the category filter in the WHERE clause and specify the `partition_key` parameter when the category is the partition key вњ…
- Create a separate container for each product category and execute vector searches against the appropriate container

**ДђГЎp ГЎn: WHERE clause + partition_key parameter**

```python
query = """
    SELECT TOP 10
        c.id, c.title,
        VectorDistance(c.embedding, @queryVector) AS SimilarityScore
    FROM c
    WHERE c.category = @category
    ORDER BY VectorDistance(c.embedding, @queryVector)
"""

results = container.query_items(
    query=query,
    parameters=[
        {"name": "@queryVector", "value": query_embedding},
        {"name": "@category", "value": "networking"}
    ],
    partition_key="networking"    # Single-partition routing
)
```

Khi category lГ  partition key, query route Д‘бєїn **mб»™t partition duy nhбєҐt** thay vГ¬ scan tбєҐt cбєЈ. Database xб»­ lГЅ filter вЂ” khГґng cбє§n fetch all rб»“i filter trong app code.

TбєЎi sao cГЎc Д‘ГЎp ГЎn cГІn lбєЎi sai:
- **Cross-partition search + filter in app:** Fetch tбєҐt cбєЈ results tб»« mб»Ќi partition в†’ tб»‘n RU rбєҐt nhiб»Ѓu, latency cao, transfer data khГґng cбє§n thiбєїt. App code filter khГґng thб»ѓ giбєЈm RU Д‘ГЈ tiГЄu tб»‘n.
- **Separate container per category:** Over-engineered, khГі maintain. Mб»—i container = separate resource в†’ cost tДѓng. KhГґng cбє§n thiбєїt khi Cosmos DB Д‘ГЈ cГі partition key mechanism.

## CГўu 4

**A development team wants to implement search that combines semantic understanding with exact keyword matching for technical terms and error codes. Which approach enables this hybrid search capability?**

- Use `ORDER BY RANK RRF` with `VectorDistance` and `FullTextScore` functions вњ…
- Execute two separate queries and merge results in application code
- Add keyword terms to the query vector before executing vector search

**ДђГЎp ГЎn: ORDER BY RANK RRF**

RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) lГ  built-in hybrid search trong Cosmos DB:

```sql
SELECT TOP 10 *
FROM c
ORDER BY RANK RRF(
    VectorDistance(c.embedding, @queryVector),    -- Semantic
    FullTextScore(c.content, @errorCode, @term)   -- Exact keyword
)
```

Document rank cao trong cбєЈ hai в†’ xuбєҐt hiб»‡n Д‘бє§u tiГЄn. User search "error 0x80070005 access denied": error code Д‘Ж°б»Јc exact match (full-text), cГІn "access denied" Д‘Ж°б»Јc semantic match (vector).

TбєЎi sao cГЎc Д‘ГЎp ГЎn cГІn lбєЎi sai:
- **Hai queries separate + merge in app:** Thб»±c hiб»‡n Д‘Ж°б»Јc nhЖ°ng phб»©c tбєЎp hЖЎn nhiб»Ѓu вЂ” 2 round trips, merge logic, ranking khГґng consistent. RRF trong DB lГ  giбєЈi phГЎp native, efficient hЖЎn.
- **Add keyword vГ o query vector:** Vector space khГґng hoбєЎt Д‘б»™ng nhЖ° vбє­y. Concatenate text trЖ°б»›c khi embed tбєЎo ra embedding khГЎc nhЖ°ng khГґng cГі "exact keyword matching" вЂ” semantic meaning thay Д‘б»•i, khГґng giбєЈi quyбєїt exact match cho error codes.

## CГўu 5

**An AI application needs to keep vector embeddings synchronized with document content as documents are updated. Which approach provides reliable, automatic embedding refresh without polling?**

- Schedule a batch job to periodically scan all documents and regenerate embeddings
- Store a timestamp with each document and query for recently modified documents
- Use an Azure Functions Cosmos DB trigger to detect changes and regenerate embeddings вњ…

**ДђГЎp ГЎn: Azure Functions Cosmos DB trigger**

Cosmos DB trigger vб»›i Azure Functions lГ  **event-driven** вЂ” automatically invoked khi document change, khГґng cбє§n polling. Trigger handle partition management, checkpointing, vГ  failover.

```python
@app.cosmos_db_trigger(
    arg_name="documents",
    container_name="knowledge-base",
    database_name="support-db",
    connection="CosmosDBConnection",
    lease_container_name="leases",
    create_lease_container_if_not_exists=True
)
def refresh_embeddings(documents: func.DocumentList):
    for doc in documents:
        # Regenerate embedding vГ  upsert
```

TбєЎi sao cГЎc Д‘ГЎp ГЎn cГІn lбєЎi sai:
- **Batch job periodic scan:** Scan toГ n bб»™ container Д‘б»‹nh kб»і = tб»‘n RU rбєҐt nhiб»Ѓu, latency cao (embeddings stale trong khoбєЈng thб»ќi gian giб»Їa cГЎc lбє§n scan). KhГґng "reliable" vГ  khГґng "automatic" theo real-time changes.
- **Timestamp + query recently modified:** Vбє«n lГ  polling вЂ” phбєЈi schedule query `WHERE _ts > lastRunTime`. Phб»©c tбєЎp hЖЎn, vбє«n cГі window where embeddings stale, vГ  query `_ts` lГ  cross-partition scan tб»‘n kГ©m.

## Tб»•ng kбєїt вЂ” Kбєїt quбєЈ 5/5

| CГўu | Chб»§ Д‘б»Ѓ | ДђГЎp ГЎn |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Vector policy cho text-embedding-ada-002 | float32, 1536 dimensions, cosine |
| 2 | GiбєЈm RU cho vector search | Reduce TOP N (10-20 thay vГ¬ 100) |
| 3 | Vector search + category filter efficiently | WHERE clause + partition_key parameter |
| 4 | Hybrid semantic + exact keyword search | ORDER BY RANK RRF |
| 5 | Auto embedding refresh khi document update | Azure Functions Cosmos DB trigger |
